item.title: Contact for Online Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Contact for Online Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
Contact for Online Text Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
Download Contact for Online Text Messaging utility from www.onlinesmstextmessaging.com website to deliver unlimited text message to national or international cell phone network. Bulk sms gateway application facilitates to control the load of sending instant message in any time around the world without any internet gateway. Text messaging software that allows you to sends new schemes in different languages.

[read more]

Bulk sms gateway application facilitates to control the load of sending instant message in any time around the world without any internet gateway. Text messaging software that allows you to sends new schemes in different languages.

[read more]

item.title: TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter
(Utilities)
For importing Outlook PST file e-mails, contacts, and calendars along with attachments into Office 365 mailbox, TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter tool is a quite useful tool. Using this one-click PST to Office 365 migration application, you might also transfer particular folders or objects. To learn further, go to the official website and obtain a free trial. Manual Outlook PST importing to Office 365 takes a lot of time and effort. To ease this chore, TrustVare has developed the PST to Office 365 migration tool. TrustVare PST is therefore the best option if you intend to migrate your Outlook e-mails, contacts, and calendars to Office 365 mailbox. Outlook PST file data is uploaded by the application to a cloud-based Office 365 account in extremely quick time. Before sending PST file data into Office 365 account, the PST to Office 365 importer imports PST file data and preview all items. The software will handle everything; you must search a PST file and provide your Office 365 account login details. The software will offer 100% correct results and many more conveniences.
Essential Characteristics

Directly import Outlook mail into PST.

Backward Support for Multiple Languages

Easily navigable interface

Batch migration Outlook PST to Office 365

Organise Folders Hierarchy

100% Safe and Secure Instrument

supports every Windows operating system variant.

Attend to both ANSI and Unicode PST files.
[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter
(Utilities)
For importing Outlook PST file e-mails, contacts, and calendars along with attachments into Office 365 mailbox, TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter tool is a quite useful tool. Using this one-click PST to Office 365 migration application, you might also transfer particular folders or objects. To learn further, go to the official website and obtain a free trial. Manual Outlook PST importing to Office 365 takes a lot of time and effort. To ease this chore, TrustVare has developed the PST to Office 365 migration tool. TrustVare PST is therefore the best option if you intend to migrate your Outlook e-mails, contacts, and calendars to Office 365 mailbox. Outlook PST file data is uploaded by the application to a cloud-based Office 365 account in extremely quick time. Before sending PST file data into Office 365 account, the PST to Office 365 importer imports PST file data and preview all items. The software will handle everything; you must search a PST file and provide your Office 365 account login details. The software will offer 100% correct results and many more conveniences.
Essential Characteristics

Directly import Outlook mail into PST.

Backward Support for Multiple Languages

Easily navigable interface

Batch migration Outlook PST to Office 365

Organise Folders Hierarchy

100% Safe and Secure Instrument

supports every Windows operating system variant.

Attend to both ANSI and Unicode PST files.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter
(Utilities)
For importing Outlook PST file e-mails, contacts, and calendars along with attachments into Office 365 mailbox, TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter tool is a quite useful tool. Using this one-click PST to Office 365 migration application, you might also transfer particular folders or objects. To learn further, go to the official website and obtain a free trial. Manual Outlook PST importing to Office 365 takes a lot of time and effort. To ease this chore, TrustVare has developed the PST to Office 365 migration tool. TrustVare PST is therefore the best option if you intend to migrate your Outlook e-mails, contacts, and calendars to Office 365 mailbox. Outlook PST file data is uploaded by the application to a cloud-based Office 365 account in extremely quick time. Before sending PST file data into Office 365 account, the PST to Office 365 importer imports PST file data and preview all items. The software will handle everything; you must search a PST file and provide your Office 365 account login details. The software will offer 100% correct results and many more conveniences.
Essential Characteristics

Directly import Outlook mail into PST.

Backward Support for Multiple Languages

Easily navigable interface

Batch migration Outlook PST to Office 365

Organise Folders Hierarchy

100% Safe and Secure Instrument

supports every Windows operating system variant.

Attend to both ANSI and Unicode PST files.
[read more]

item.title: Online Android Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Online Android Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
Online Android Text Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
Bulk Online Android Text Messaging application provides congestion control facility and capable users to forward unlimited text sms on several mobile connection consumers without getting any network trouble. Free bulk sms broadcasting software create and transmit free messages on several contact phones without any internet gateway required.

[read more]

item.title: Modems Text Messaging Program [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Modems Text Messaging Program [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
Modems Text Messaging Program
(Chat & Messenging)
Worried about how to send bulk sms from pc? Use cost effective USB Modems Text Messaging Program that empowers professional users to broadcast product advertisement information all over world in less span of time. Technically advance group messages broadcasting tool does not require any special hardware device or sms gateway to transmit unlimited job alerts using USB modems connected with desktop or laptop machines.

[read more]

item.title: Barcodes for Warehouse [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Barcodes for Warehouse [Financial]
item.itunes:author: businessbarcodes3
item.itunes:summary:
Barcodes for Warehouse
(Financial)
Do you want to generate business barcode labels from your laptop? Highly technical Barcodes for Warehouse application is simply downloaded from www.businessbarcodes.net to create high resolution warehousing industrial barcode labels, product packaging stickers, security tags and others in different types of shapes, colors, fonts or sizes.
[read more]

item.title: Youtube and Downloader [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Youtube and Downloader [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Youtube and Downloader
(Internet Apps)
Unofficial youtube player and downloader
v1.0
you will need qt6 and yt-dlp for this to work
please make sure you have them installed

current features
play a video you can also view the video in fullscreen with the added fullscreen api thats included
when you select a video to play it will ask you if you want to download either as .mp3 sound or .mp4 video
downloads with download into the downloads folder you can use your file manager to get the file
[read more]

item.title: Latest Whatsapp Linux [Chat & Messenging]

item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Latest Whatsapp Linux
(Chat & Messenging)
unofficial whatsapp appimage
v1.01
update saved login now works as intended
you will need qt6 installed

i created this to keep upto date with the latest whatsapp ui

please note i am not the developer i just made this appimage
i hope you enjoy

item.title: Kde Pling Store Appimage [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Kde Pling Store Appimage [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Kde Pling Store Appimage
(Internet Apps)
unofficial kde online store appimage
you will need qt6 installed

i made this because i had enough of logging into the online store
i wanted an appication to upload my files or download others files
not to sure if i can upload just yet but i will see when i next have something to upload


v1.01
login now saves
tested and seems to be working fine
hope you enjoy

v1.0
current features
browser things to download on any store
downloaded files are notified when finished and dolphin will open in downloads location
[read more]
